Metadata.SourceFile: Super Bowl XX (Game Set and Match 2).tap
Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x2074 "SUPERBOWLXX-2074" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Super Bowl XX (J1).prg"
